I will ask you some verification questions and questions related to your health. This call is being recorded for company quality and audit purposes. I will ask you some questions that are in your insurance application, and this recorded call will last approximately 7 to 10 minutes, approximately 5 minutes. Please note that any information you provide to us through this call, related to your health and habits, will become a part of your insurance application, and if your proposal is accepted, a legal contract will be formed between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance based on that.
